visa_types.overview:
Overview
- Business
- Applicable for the purpose of attending a business meeting, a conference or a short professional training in Italy.
- The Schengen visa may be issued for a single entry, for two entries, or as a multiple entry visa in case the applicant proves the need or justifies the intention to travel frequently
                                                                                as well as proves his/her integrity and reliability, in particular the lawful use of previous Schengen visas, etc. (as per Schengen Visa Code, Article 24). A non-EU citizen
                                                                                traveller, regardless of the fact whether he/she is subject to visa obligation, may stay in the Schengen area for a maximum of 90 days in any 180-day period.
- It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- Business
- Applicable for the purpose of attending a business meeting, a conference or a short professional training in Italy.
- The Schengen visa may be issued for a single entry, for two entries, or as a multiple entry visa in case the applicant proves the need or justifies the intention to travel frequently
                                                                                as well as proves his/her integrity and reliability, in particular the lawful use of previous Schengen visas, etc. (as per Schengen Visa Code, Article 24). A non-EU citizen
                                                                                traveller, regardless of the fact whether he/she is subject to visa obligation, may stay in the Schengen area for a maximum of 90 days in any 180-day period.
- It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business]

- Please note the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Italy Visa Application Centre in Cash/ Debit card/ Credit card in BHD only
- In addition to the above, applicants will also have to pay VFS Service charge of BHD 5.10 at the Visa application centre.

## Documents Required

[Table:Business]

## Photo Specifications
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably maximum 3 months old)
- Must be a colour photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-90% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed

## Processing Time
Usually, the processing time at the Embassy can take up to 15 working days. However, the processing time may take shorter or longer, depending on the nationality of the applicant.
                                                                            Customers can apply for the visa 6 months in advance from the planned travel date.

## Download Form
- Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/48kQYW8UvHnift36X5WVMU/94cfd014cc0e5a9646707be2c1a5f4cb/visa-application-form-feb-2020.pdf)
- Financial Support Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5vTDTDV7UVx2jPEEmHKsOG/52cb2cde54c7dcd32ec5d5bbe5dd40d2/financial-letter.pdf)
- Domestic workers sponsorship letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4nBedPbcZ2cCFvFtwClnEw/1b76a099143f1dc96ef15de3c67ef2e8/sponsorship-letter-2023.pdf)
- Host Declaration for Individual (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3mcFCJPY5alotleHUtj6xr/4abb9f16abfeb6953ea25d6a097e49db/host-declaration-for-individual.pdf)
- Invitation Form (From Italian Company) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1Opsgn8Tb2Emo95KOpzit5/b023f874740d2ba53904bd9d4a9d1087/invitation-form.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
- This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to Italy the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
You may apply for a Schengen visa based on the country of destination, which means the country where you need to lodge your application, according to the Schengen rules.
These rules are as follows:
- If you are going to visit only one Schengen country, file your application at the embassy/consulate/visa centre of that country
- If you are going to visit more than two Schengen countries, file your application:
- At the embassy/consulate/visa centre of the country where will be the main destination, or where you will spend most days if you will be spending an unequal amount of days in each
- At the embassy/consulate/visa centre of the country where you will step first, if you will be spending an equal amount of days in each
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to Italy the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
You may apply for a Schengen visa based on the country of destination, which means the country where you need to lodge your application, according to the Schengen rules.
These rules are as follows:
- If you are going to visit only one Schengen country, file your application at the embassy/consulate/visa centre of that country
- If you are going to visit more than two Schengen countries, file your application:
- At the embassy/consulate/visa centre of the country where will be the main destination, or where you will spend most days if you will be spending an unequal amount of days in each
- At the embassy/consulate/visa centre of the country where you will step first, if you will be spending an equal amount of days in each
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourist]
Please note the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Italy Visa Application Centre in Cash/Credit/Debit card in BHD only
In addition to the above, applicants will also have to pay VFS Service charge of BHD 5.10 at the Visa Application centre. 

## Documents Required

[Table:Tourist]

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably maximum 3 months old)
- Must be a colour photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-90% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed

## Processing Time
Usually, the processing time at the Embassy can take up to 15 working days. However, the processing time may take shorter or longer, depending on the nationality of the applicant.
                                                                            Customers can apply for the visa 6 months in advance from the planned travel date. 

## Download Form
- Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/48kQYW8UvHnift36X5WVMU/94cfd014cc0e5a9646707be2c1a5f4cb/visa-application-form-feb-2020.pdf)
- Financial Support Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5vTDTDV7UVx2jPEEmHKsOG/52cb2cde54c7dcd32ec5d5bbe5dd40d2/financial-letter.pdf)
- Domestic workers sponsorship letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4nBedPbcZ2cCFvFtwClnEw/1b76a099143f1dc96ef15de3c67ef2e8/sponsorship-letter-2023.pdf)
- Host Declaration for Individual (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3mcFCJPY5alotleHUtj6xr/4abb9f16abfeb6953ea25d6a097e49db/host-declaration-for-individual.pdf)
- Parental Authority Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1rRLyEeAe5THmX4TRgAss3/312f4bd9e2397fd758589ebfb2cbd00e/parental-authority-form-tourist-recent.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for applicants who are basically transiting through Italy and it mainly issued for Seaman’s whose vessels are expected to transit through Italy. 
Please click on Do I need a visa? (http://vistoperitalia.esteri.it/home/en) to find out whether a Schengen visa is required or check on
                                                                            the interactive map (https://ec.europa.eu/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas_en) to learn more about the Schengen
                                                                            area.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for applicants who are basically transiting through Italy and it mainly issued for Seaman’s whose vessels are expected to transit through Italy. 
Please click on Do I need a visa? (http://vistoperitalia.esteri.it/home/en) to find out whether a Schengen visa is required or check on
                                                                            the interactive map (https://ec.europa.eu/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas_en) to learn more about the Schengen
                                                                            area.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Transit Visa]
Please note the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Italy Visa Application Centre in Cash / Debit / Credit card in BHD only
In addition to the above, applicants will also have to pay VFS Service charge of BHD 5.10 at the Visa Application centre. 

## Documents Required
For information on exact requirement please refer to the website http://vistoperitalia.esteri.it (http://vistoperitalia.esteri.it/). 

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably maximum 3 months old)
- Must be a colour photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-90% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed

## Processing Time
Usually, the processing time at the Embassy can take up to 15 working days. However, the processing time may take shorter or longer, depending on the nationality of the applicant.
                                                                            Customers can apply for the visa 6 months in advance from the planned travel date.

## Download Form
- Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/48kQYW8UvHnift36X5WVMU/94cfd014cc0e5a9646707be2c1a5f4cb/visa-application-form-feb-2020.pdf)

visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
The Embassy of Italy is competent for examining and deciding on your application in the following situations:
- Italy is the only country you wish to visit in the Schengen area,
- In case your visit includes more than one Schengen country, Italy constitutes the main destination in terms of the length or purpose of stay,
- In case no main destination can be determined (the purpose and length of stay in several Schengen countries are the same), Italy is the first country to enter the territory of the Schengen
                                                                    area (1st airport).
For more details on the rules stated above kindly see the Schengen Information leaflet attached below or the Schengen Visa Code, Article 5. Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5Ov8GlBuZP8FJzfiNJgsuK/fd5fe1210c63dfc191ea322032e77da6/schengen-visa-application-new.pdf)
visa_types.full_text:
The Embassy of Italy is competent for examining and deciding on your application in the following situations:
- Italy is the only country you wish to visit in the Schengen area,
- In case your visit includes more than one Schengen country, Italy constitutes the main destination in terms of the length or purpose of stay,
- In case no main destination can be determined (the purpose and length of stay in several Schengen countries are the same), Italy is the first country to enter the territory of the Schengen
                                                                    area (1st airport).
For more details on the rules stated above kindly see the Schengen Information leaflet attached below or the Schengen Visa Code, Article 5. Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5Ov8GlBuZP8FJzfiNJgsuK/fd5fe1210c63dfc191ea322032e77da6/schengen-visa-application-new.pdf)
